description_long: This sculpture depicts a robed female figure standing upright, with her head slightly bowed and covered by a headscarf or hood. The figure's right hand is holding an object, possibly a scroll or a small cylindrical item, while her left hand gathers the folds of her garment. The drapery of the robe is intricately carved, creating deep, flowing folds that cascade down to the base. The facial features are softly rendered, giving the figure a serene and contemplative expression. The material appears to be a medium-brown wood, with a matte finish and visible grain texture throughout.
description: A wooden sculpture of a robed female figure with a headscarf, holding a small object and featuring detailed drapery and a serene expression.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, headscarf, and both hands, with the right hand holding a small object.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the draped robe, and the hand holding the object.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view showing the back of the head and the flowing robe with less detail on the face and hands.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the drapery's depth and the figure's bowed head, with the hand and object partially visible.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate installation environment.
